scripts.start: npm run build && node dist/cases/index.js beta
scripts.clinic:beta:doctor: NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic doctor --output clinic/beta/doctor -- node dist/cases/index.js beta || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:beta:flame: NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic flame --output clinic/beta/flame -- node dist/cases/index.js beta || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:beta:bubbleprof: NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic bubbleprof --output clinic/beta/bubbleprof -- node dist/cases/index.js beta || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:beta: npm run clinic:beta:doctor && npm run clinic:beta:flame && npm run clinic:beta:bubbleprof
scripts.clinic:v3:doctor: NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic doctor --output clinic/v3/doctor -- node dist/cases/index.js v3 || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:v3:flame: NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic flame --output clinic/v3/flame -- node dist/cases/index.js v3 || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:v3:bubbleprof: NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic bubbleprof --output clinic/v3/bubbleprof -- node dist/cases/index.js v3 || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:v3: npm run clinic:v3:doctor && npm run clinic:v3:flame && npm run clinic:v3:bubbleprof
scripts.clinic:v4:doctor: NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic doctor --output clinic/v4/doctor -- node dist/cases/index.js v4 || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:v4:flame: NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic flame --output clinic/v4/flame -- node dist/cases/index.js v4 || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:v4:bubbleprof: NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic bubbleprof --output clinic/v4/bubbleprof -- node dist/cases/index.js v4 || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:v4: npm run clinic:v4:doctor && npm run clinic:v4:flame && npm run clinic:v4:bubbleprof
scripts.clinic:all: npm run build && npm run clinic:beta && npm run clinic:v3 && npm run clinic:v4 && npm run cleanup:traces
